title: Enchanted Books Levels
description: Enchanted Books Extended is a simple yet powerful mod that extends all multi-level enchantments up to level 10!
body:
Enchanted Books Extended
> ūüďĖ Description
> 
> Enchanted Books Extended is a simple yet powerful mod that extends all multi-level enchantments up to level 10!

> Ever wanted Sharpness X on your sword? Or Protection X on your armor? Now you can!

> ‚ú® Features
- Extended Enchantment Levels ‚ÄĒ All enchantments that normally have multiple levels (like Sharpness, Protection, Efficiency, Unbreaking, etc.) now go up to level 10
- Smart Detection ‚ÄĒ Single-level enchantments like Mending, Silk Touch, Infinity, Aqua Affinity, Flame, Channeling, and Multishot remain unchanged
- Full Anvil Support ‚ÄĒ Apply high-level enchantments via anvil without them being capped to vanilla limits
- Creative Tab ‚ÄĒ New creative tab with all enchanted books from level 1 to 10 for easy access
- Vanilla-Friendly ‚ÄĒ Works with vanilla enchanting mechanics, just with higher caps
